app.title: EntropyForge
banner.text: This app uses OS-level entropy via Python's secrets module—not the Mersenne Twister random module. You can dismiss this banner permanently.
dialog.paranoid.title: Confirm large generation
dialog.paranoid.message_hex: You are about to generate a large hex key ({bytes} bytes). Continue?
dialog.paranoid.message_integers: You are about to draw from a very large integer range (span {span}). Continue?
dialog.paranoid.message_password: You are about to generate a long password ({length} characters). Continue?
entropy.hint_bar: Bar shows strength relative to a 256-bit scale (informational).
entropy.label: Entropy (bits)
error.hex_bytes_invalid: Hex key size must be a positive integer (bytes).
error.hex_bytes_limit: Hex key size exceeds the allowed maximum (bytes).
error.length_invalid: Length must be a positive integer.
error.password_length_limit: Password length exceeds the allowed maximum.
error.range_min_max: Minimum must be less than maximum.
error.range_parse: Enter valid integers for minimum and maximum.
error.unexpected: Something went wrong. Details were written to the log file.
hint.hex_bytes_max: Up to {max} bytes (hex length will be twice this).
hint.integers_range: Use decimal integers only. Minimum must be less than maximum.
hint.shortcuts: Tip: press Enter in a field to generate. Ctrl+Enter / ⌘+Return also works.
settings.restart_notice: Restart the application to apply the language.
settings.title: Settings
status.copy_skipped_empty: Nothing to copy — generate output first.
